label: CIS Safeguard 13.3
title: Deploy a Network Intrusion Detection Solution

prose.en: Deploy a network intrusion detection solution on enterprise assets, where appropriate. Example implementations include the use of a Network Intrusion Detection System (NIDS) or equivalent cloud service provider (CSP) service.
A network intrusion detection solution is deployed on enterprise assets, where appropriate.

example.en: Example implementations include the use of a Network Intrusion Detection System (NIDS) or equivalent cloud service provider (CSP) service.
